Registry / Terms / accuracy class

accuracy class

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00825 · 12 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.19view ↗

class of measuring instruments that meet certain metrological requirements that are intended to keep errors within specified limits

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.19
    class of measuring instruments that meet certain metrological requirements that are intended to keep errors within specified limits

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIM 2012 (concept #4.25). Definition may differ from VIM 1993.
  2. MEDIUM 8 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 9 partially diverge.
